jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
